title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXLII. Relics.
content:
When Jacky's a very good boy,
            He shall have cakes and a custard;
        But when he does nothing but cry,
            He shall have nothing but mustard.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXLII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
